response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned full-stack engineer with genuine distributed systems exposure and a long career, but he critically fails the minimum qualification of 8 years of C++ experience — his C++ usage appears limited to roughly 6 months at National Instruments in 2007–2008 and a bachelor's thesis side project, with C++ absent from his listed skills entirely. The role is explicitly C++-centric at the infrastructure level, and no amount of TypeScript, DLang, or Node.js work substitutes for that requirement. Additionally, there is no documented record of formal technical leadership, cross-team mentoring, or ownership of a cloud compute platform.
strengths: Extensive distributed systems and high-throughput microservices experience, including work handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Sociomantic
Broad infrastructure and DevOps familiarity spanning Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud tooling (AWS CDK)
Consistent knowledge-sharing track record through public talks, workshops, and open-source library authorship
concerns: C++ experience is negligible (~6 months in 2007–2008 at National Instruments), nowhere near the 8-year minimum; C++ does not even appear in his skills section
No evidence of owning or leading a cloud compute platform at any scale — AWS CDK use at Optilyz is the closest analog and is far below the required depth
No documented formal technical lead role with cross-team mentoring responsibilities; staff/senior individual contributor titles do not demonstrate the leadership mandate required
